task: Fix unclear/wrong install instructions after GitHub clone URL for datalox-trajectory-mcp returned Repository not found; align README/docs with current usable repo/cache path and clear public install path.
summary: Corrected Datalox trajectory MCP install instructions to use the reachable public datalox-pack GitHub source while preserving datalox-trajectory-mcp as the local package/cache identity.
observations: README, START_HERE, docs/agent-configuration, and .datalox/manifest now clone https://github.com/Complexity-LLC/datalox-pack.git into a local datalox-trajectory-mcp directory.
bin/adopt-from-github.sh now defaults to the reachable datalox-pack GitHub repo and names the default local cache explicitly.
src/core/packCore.ts explicit recovery commands now use git clone https://github.com/Complexity-LLC/datalox-pack.git datalox-trajectory-mcp instead of the unavailable datalox-trajectory-mcp.git repo.
Relevant docs now explicitly say not to clone Complexity-LLC/datalox-trajectory-mcp.git until that GitHub repo exists or the existing repo is renamed.
